stay_with_kernel_when: question class/default row/conflict state are clear and no preserved conflict requires direct comparison
widen_to_broader_atlas_when: defaults matrix points to a preserved center that must be read directly or a preserved conflict explicitly requires direct center comparison
stop_and_reassess_when: question class cannot be assigned cleanly or current process position/horizon/completion condition cannot be stated

stay_with_kernel_when: two candidate centers are already known and comparison can land only in conflict/lineage/atlas surfaces
widen_to_broader_atlas_when: comparison requires deeper evidence from center-specific profiles
column6: comparison starts implying synthesis or hidden widening beyond declared landing boundary

stay_with_kernel_when: question is about missing center truth and output may remain atlas/evidence only
column6: recovery starts mutating current branch truth or proposing extension before missing evidence is reduced

stay_with_kernel_when: current branch surface and bridge scope are already explicit and non-reinvention claim is strong
widen_to_broader_atlas_when: repair requires deeper comparison with historical stronger centers before touching current branch
stop_and_reassess_when: repair widens from narrow bridge note toward new local architecture or unclear law mutation

stay_with_kernel_when: all prior centers have been checked and genuinely absent gap is evidenced
widen_to_broader_atlas_when: extension still needs deeper center comparison or unresolved conflict review before code/design landing
stop_and_reassess_when: absence claim is weak or preserved conflicts imply the extension may actually be replacement/invention
